DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/data-secur.description:
Soft deletes a webhook configuration by its unique identifier.
The webhook will be marked as deleted and will no longer be available for use.

parameters.description: Cloudflare account ID for the user making the request.
parameters.name: account_id

parameters.description: A UUID identifying the webhook configuration.
parameters.name: webhook_id

schema.description: Common response structure for all API endpoints.

pointer.description: JSON pointer to the source of the error.
JSON pointer to the source of the error.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

400.description: Bad Request: Invalid webhook ID or webhook already deleted

pointer.description: JSON pointer to the source of the error.
JSON pointer to the source of the error.

409.description: Conflict: webhook is associated with one or more workflow configs and cannot be deleted

GET /accounts/{account_id}/data-security.description:
Retrieves all webhook configurations for the authenticated account.
Returns an array of webhook configurations that can be used to send finding notifications.

parameters.description: Cloudflare account ID for the user making the request.
parameters.name: account_id

allOf.description: Common response structure for all API endpoints.

pointer.description: JSON pointer to the source of the error.
JSON pointer to the source of the error.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

items.description: Webhook configuration for sending finding notifications.

authentication_type.description: Type of authentication used for the webhook.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the webhook configuration was created.

destination_url.description: Target URL for the webhook configuration. Where resulting data will be sent.

headers.description: List of header keys configured for this webhook. Values are not included for security reasons.

value.description: Header value. This field is never returned in API responses for security reasons.

id.description: Unique identifier for the specific webhook configuration.

label.description: Account-specified display label for the webhook configuration.

status.description: Current status of the webhook configuration. If disabled, data cannot be sent through this configuration.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the webhook configuration was last updated.

pointer.description: JSON pointer to the source of the error.
JSON pointer to the source of the error.
JSON pointer to the source of the error.
JSON pointer to the source of the error.

label.description: Account-specified display label for the webhook configuration.

signing_secret.description: Secret key used for HMAC signing when authentication_type is "HMAC-Signing".

POST /accounts/{account_id}/data-securit.description:
Sends a test webhook event using an existing webhook configuration.
This allows customers to verify their webhook endpoint is still reachable and properly 
configured after creating the webhook resource.

The test payload includes:
- event_type: "webhook.test"
- timestamp: Current UTC timestamp
- message: Test message indicating this is from Cloudflare CASB
- data: Object with test: true

parameters.description: Cloudflare account ID for the user making the request.
parameters.name: account_id

parameters.description: A UUID identifying the webhook configuration.
parameters.name: webhook_id

allOf.description: Common response structure for all API endpoints.

pointer.description: JSON pointer to the source of the error.
JSON pointer to the source of the error.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

result.description: Response body for webhook evaluation test results.

message.description: Human-readable message describing the test result.

status_code.description: HTTP status code returned by the webhook endpoint. 0 if connection failed.

success.description: Whether the webhook test was successful (received 2xx response).

200.description: OK: Webhook test completed (check success field for result)

pointer.description: JSON pointer to the source of the error.
JSON pointer to the source of the error.
JSON pointer to the source of the error.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/data-securit.description:
Sends a test webhook event to the specified destination URL to verify the webhook endpoint 
is reachable and properly configured. This allows customers to validate their webhook 
configuration before creating the actual webhook resource.

The test payload includes:
- event_type: "webhook.test"
- timestamp: Current UTC timestamp
- message: Test message indicating this is from Cloudflare CASB
- data: Object with test: true

parameters.description: Cloudflare account ID for the user making the request.
parameters.name: account_id

schema.description: Request body for testing a webhook configuration before creating it.

authentication_type.description: Type of authentication to use for the test webhook request.

destination_url.description: Target URL to send the test webhook event to.

headers.description: List of custom headers to include in the test webhook request.

items.description: A header to include in webhook requests. On Create/Evaluate, both key and value are required. On Update, omitting value means "keep existing value".

value.description: Header value. Required on Create and Evaluate. On Update, omit or set to null to keep existing value.

signing_secret.description: Secret key used for HMAC signing when authentication_type is "HMAC-Signing".

allOf.description: Common response structure for all API endpoints.

pointer.description: JSON pointer to the source of the error.
JSON pointer to the source of the error.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

result.description: Response body for webhook evaluation test results.

status_code.description: HTTP status code returned by the webhook endpoint. 0 if connection failed.

success.description: Whether the webhook test was successful (received 2xx response).

200.description: OK: Webhook test completed (check success field for result)
